diagnosis: 311 impressions across ~30 queries and ~47 pages, but 0 clicks. Average position 19.3 means pages rank around page 2. The CTR problem is either: (a) meta snippets are generic/unappealing, (b) titles don't match search intent, or (c) Google shows richer competitors that steal clicks.

top_zero_click_opportunities.likely_no_click_reason: Page 2 — needs title/meta improvement to compete with page 1 results
top_zero_click_opportunities.recommended_action: CTR fix: improve title + meta for click appeal
